entries.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
entries.description: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

entries.title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending continues
entries.description: Companies are burning through exorbitant sums of money to keep pace in the AI arms race. Debt is climbing.

entries.title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
entries.description: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.

entries.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
entries.description: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

entries.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
entries.description: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

entries.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
entries.description: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

entries.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
entries.description: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

entries.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
entries.description: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

entries.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
entries.description: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation from S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.

entries.title: Decart’s new world model can simulate hours of photorealistic driving — with some caveats
entries.description: Decart is launching Oasis 3, a real-time world model that generates photorealistic driving environments for autonomous vehicle testing, now available via API for developers to build on.

entries.title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
entries.description: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.

entries.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
entries.description: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.
